reason: Verified SAD v1.0.0 (2026-07-01) against SPEC.md v2.0.0 + harness §2.1 design principles via Read. All 3 FRs map to ≥1 module (FR-01→models/store/validation; FR-02→executor+redact; FR-03→cli/query). All 3 NFRs addressed with concern+measure (NFR-01 warm-process amortised p95<50ms with cold-start scope-statement; NFR-02 single-chokepoint subprocess + blacklist; NFR-03 atomic tmp+os.replace + redact-before-persist). Dependency graph acyclic (cli is composition root; models/config/validation/redact leaves). 10 runtime files, ≤15 cap. SAB block has literal <!-- SAB:START --> marker; phase: 2 is bare int; NFR types use legal values (performance/security/reliability). D-01/D-02/D-03 deviations explicitly captured in §2.5 awaiting ADR. Compliance checklist §6 fully ticked.
